claims: The WPHX PHP emitter now generates the original-path public PHP shell for the bounded WP_Http::chunkTransferDecode driver.
The generated class-wp-http.php passes PHP lint and the existing WPHX-312.61 oracle/candidate behavior probe.
The WPHX PHP emission manifest records class:WP_Http and no unsupported constructs for the driver.
non_claims: This does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.
Neighboring parser helpers, Requests transport behavior, installed WordPress behavior, and live transfer-encoding negotiation remain future gates.
The full WP_Http::request method remains deliberately later.
